name: Mushroom Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the stock in a saucepan.
2. Add the mushroom mixture to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Stir in the cream and heat through, stirring until smooth.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. NOTE: For a thicker gravy, mix a small amount of cornstarch with some cream, then stir this into the hot gravy.
Use this gravy with cabbage rolls and roasts. It is also very good over toast points.
